title: API Refactor: Method Upstreaming
description: Move the 'process' method logic from 'Service' class to its parent 'BaseHandler'. Ensure 'service.py' only contains the class definition and 'core.py' contains the logic.
test_script:
import unittest
from core import BaseHandler
from service import DataService

class TestRefactor(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_logic_moved(self):
        self.assertTrue(hasattr(BaseHandler, 'process'))
        ds = DataService()
        ds.process('data', {'v':1})
        self.assertEqual(ds.last_metadata, {'v':1})

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()
